noteworthy_development: Trump acknowledges indirect talks via Pakistani mediation with Iranian parliament speaker Ghalibaf - first direct naming of negotiating partner. Iran publicly contradicts Trump narrative, calling his demands unrealistic. Iranian speaker actively countering Trump on social media with market manipulation accusations. S&P down 9.3% from peak, Brent above $115. April 6 Trump deadline looms.
